dbbot v0.0.1-beta.6 unifies local archive preparation across the MySQL, ClickHouse, and monitoring playbooks.

The shared archive helper now validates cached tarballs before reuse, removes broken local copies when auto download is allowed, and fails early when a required package is missing and cannot be refreshed automatically.

This beta also updates the default MySQL example configuration to 8.4.8 on port 3306 and aligns the sample inventory with auto_silent Python interpreter discovery.
